data/maps/Route123/text.inc.Route123_Text_171D83: I love GRASS-type POKéMON!\pDo you have any GRASS-type POKéMON?
data/maps/Route123/text.inc.Route123_Text_171DC2: Oh?\pYou like GRASS-type POKéMON, too,\ndon't you?\pI'm so happy, you can have this!\nIt's a token of our friendship.
data/maps/Route123/text.inc.Route123_Text_171E34: I check trees with my GRASS-type\nPOKéMON. I'm like a tree doctor.
data/maps/Route123/text.inc.Route123_Text_171E8E: {0x79} MT. PYRE\n“Forbidden to the faint of heart.”
